title: Senior Doctor - Hinduja Healthcare - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Hinduja Healthcare - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Hinduja Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hinduja Healthcare:
Hinduja Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
